flavourText: "She fled from the prison of her birth, drawn by the breaking
of that great Silence. At that moment, the universe was changed,
and walls that were once impenetrable became brittle.
A fortress became a shell, and she alone escaped."

three men with a single arrow.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires a piercing shot that travels until it reaches the targeted location. It will then fire projectiles out in all directions from that point, which will travel for a short time before disappearing.

implicitMods: Gain 5% of Physical Damage as Extra Cold Damage
explicitMods: 11% increased Movement Speed if you haven't been Hit Recently

Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff adding cold damage to spells and attacks. If you shatter an enemy, this skill will cause them to explode and deal AoE cold damage to enemies near them. This damage is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Attack Cold Damage
Buff grants 38 to 56 Added Spell Cold Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff providing fire damage based on your physical damage. While you have this buff, if you kill an enemy, other enemies near them will be burned based on the overkill damage. The burn inflicted by this skill can only be affected by modifiers to damage over time (burning damage is damage over time).
explicitMods: Base Burning Damage is 30% of Overkill Damage
Buff grants 21% of your Physical Damage as Extra Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires an arrow at the target destination. When the arrow lands, you are teleported to it and a clone is summoned at your old location. The clone is a minion that uses your bow and quiver.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

craftedMods: 30% increased Rarity of Items found during Effect

5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage. When you kill an enemy while you have this buff, this skill will summon a Sentinel of Purity, or refresh the duration and life of an existing one instead if you have the maximum number of them. The Sentinels of Purity have a single-target melee attack and an area melee attack.
explicitMods: Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Kill an Enemy
20% chance to Summon a Sentinel of Purity when you Hit a Rare or Unique Enemy
Minions have 40% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants elemental resistances and elemental ailment immunity to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain +40% to all Elemental Resistances
You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which adds lightning damage to spells and attacks. If you kill a shocked enemy, this skill will create a storm, causing lightning bolts to strike enemies around you for a duration. The damage inflicted by this skill is not affected by modifiers to spell damage.
explicitMods: Storm Hits an Enemy every 0.25 Seconds
Storms Hit Enemies with 23% increased Frequency
Creates a storm when you Kill a Shocked Enemy
Buff grants 14 to 57 Added Attack Lightning Damage
Buff grants 14 to 57 Added Spell Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Sol Remnant
explicitMods: 4% chance to receive additional Gold when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
Monsters have 5% chance to Duplicate dropped Rogue's Marker
14% chance in Heists for Orbs of Scouring to drop as Orbs of Regret instead

name: Loath Wind
implicitMods: Enemies you Kill have a 25% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Physical Damage
Item sells for much more to vendors

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a wall of fire for a duration, which deals burning damage to everything in its area. Each enemy that enters the wall also receives a secondary burning debuff which persists for a short duration after leaving the wall. Any projectiles fired through the wall by you and allies deal added fire damage and apply the wall's secondary debuff on hit.
explicitMods: Deals 349.5 Base Fire Damage per second
Secondary Debuff Deals 1165.2 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
Maximum 4 Flame Walls at a time
Projectiles which pass through the wall deal 58 to 87 Added Fire Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies. If enemies are left below 10% of maximum life after being hit by these skills, they will be killed.
explicitMods: Kill Enemies that have 10% Life or lower when Hit by Supported Skills
Recover 2% of Life when Supported Skills Cull an Enemy

socketedItems.secDescrText: Must support both an attack skill and a spell skill to work. The attack skill will trigger a spell when it critically strikes an enemy. Cannot support totems, traps, or mines. Vaal skills, channelling skills, and skills with a reservation cannot be triggered.
explicitMods: Supported Skills deal 9% less Spell Damage
Supported Attacks will Trigger a Supported Spell when you Crit an Enemy

Supported Skills have 20% increased Spell Critical Strike Chance
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Fires an arrow into the air to land at a targeted location, dealing area damage. The arrow sticks in the ground where it lands, and periodically fires a beam of lightning to you, dealing area damage between the arrow and you.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 35% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. It will move forward for a duration, during which your projectiles can collide with it to deal damage as though it was an enemy. Then it will chase down enemies for a secondary duration, and reflect a portion of the damage it took from your projectiles to them in addition to its own damage.
explicitMods: During initial Duration, can be hit by your Projectiles up to 20 times
Reflects 10% of Damage Taken to Enemies
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

implicitMods: Bow Attacks fire an additional Arrow
explicitMods: 5 to 14 Added Physical Damage with Bow Attacks

flavourText: Enacting a grand vision requires cold-hearted sacrifice.
